_template_description: The sacrifice arc — mentor deaths, last stands, torch-passing. Obi-Wan, Dumbledore, Yondu, Itachi.

concept.one_sentence: The mentor falls so the student can rise — parallel across fandoms.

acts.name: bond
acts.notes: Quiet moments between mentor and student. Looks, laughs, small teachings.

acts.name: threat
acts.notes: Danger arrives. Student isn't ready. Mentor steps up.

acts.name: sacrifice
acts.notes: The mentor falls. Cut on the drop or the breakdown.

acts.name: legacy
acts.notes: Student carries it forward. Final hero shot.
